Free and open-source software

# Diagonale (formerly: PhysioExplorer)

Repository: [link](https://github.com/GermanoGallicchio/PhysioExplorer)

Documentation: [link](https://germanogallicchio.github.io/PhysioExplorer_documentation/index.html)

Reference: Gallicchio, G. (2025). PhysioExplorer. Zenodo. [https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16808782](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16808782)


# Fase (formerly: Polar)

A circular statistics toolbox for computing polar metrics. It includes functions for calculating angular and radial metrics.

Repository: [link](https://github.com/GermanoGallicchio/Polar)

Documentation: [link](https://germanogallicchio.github.io/Polar_documentation/index.html)

Reference: work in progress

# Prisma

A toolbox for implementing various time-frequency decomposition methods (e.g., short-time Fourier transform, continuous wavelet transform, multitaper short-time Fourtier transform, etc.).

Repository: [link](https://github.com/GermanoGallicchio/Prisma)

Documentation: [link](https://germanogallicchio.github.io/Prisma_documentation/index.html)

Reference: work in progress
